I'm Zarwish — I illustrate children's books and build visual identities, from a first sketch of a shy little pup to a logo a business wears for years. Based in Bhakkar, Pakistan, working with clients everywhere.

About

Two crafts, one hand.

Adobe Photoshop
Adobe Illustrator

Canva
CapCut
AI Design Tools

Creative Graphic Designer, Illustrator, Video Editor & AI Video Animator with 5+ years of experience delivering branding, logo design, children's book illustrations, AI-generated artwork, and marketing materials.

I've completed 300+ professional illustrations and collaborated with international clients and Digital Pathway (India) on creative projects — moving comfortably between a tender picture-book spread in the morning and a sharp product campaign by the afternoon.

"Whether it's a puppy learning to share or a brand learning to speak — the job is the same: make it easy to fall for."
